news.title: Microsoft takes over a Texas AI data center expansion after OpenAI backs away
news.description: Microsoft is taking over a data center construction project in Texas after OpenAI declined to pursue it, in a move that will make the two companies neighbors at one of the nation’s largest complexes for running artificial intelligence

news.title: Federal judge halts Trump administration’s designation of Anthropic as supply chain risk
news.description: Judge Alsup ruled Anthropic’s use of lawfully acquired books for AI training qualifies as fair use, but its pirated book usage may face “criminal-level” copyright penalties in a December trial. Judge Lin paused Trump’s designation of Anthropic as a supply cha…

news.title: I used Gemini’s new AI memory importing feature, and now it knows as much about me as ChatGPT
news.description: Gemini’s new memory import feature makes switching from another AI assistant feel much less like starting over

news.title: OpenAI introduces plugins for its Codex programming assistant

news.title: 'The next evolution of the Arm compute platform': AGI CPU is Arm's first in-house AI chip, Meta and OpenAI sign up as early clients — and it might have picked the perfect time to launch
news.description: Arm introduces its first in-house AGI CPU, offering high-density performance and gaining early backing from major companies, including Meta and OpenAI.

news.title: Google nears massive financing agreement for Anthropic's 500-megawatt data center project: Report
news.description: Google is nearing a multibillion-dollar deal to support Anthropic's Texas data center, according to a new report. The dal expected to finalize soon and the financing could exceed $5 billion
